q: Do you work or are you a student?
examiner_note:
Đây là câu hỏi mở đầu kinh điển trong IELTS Speaking Part 1. Giám khảo muốn xác nhận trạng thái hiện tại của bạn để điều chỉnh các câu hỏi tiếp theo. 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Bạn nên trả lời trực diện (Direct answer), sau đó mở rộng bằng cách nêu tên trường/công ty và chuyên ngành/vị trí công việc. 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ như 'at the moment', 'currently', 'pursuing a degree' để câu văn tự nhiên hơn.

band7.text: Currently, I'm a full-time student at a university in my city. I'm in my third year, and I'm studying Economics. I find it quite challenging but very interesting because it helps me understand how the world works.
band7.note: Trả lời rõ ràng, có mở rộng ý bằng chuyên ngành và cảm nhận cá nhân. Ngữ pháp chính xác.

band8.text: At the moment, I'm pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science at a prestigious university. I'm actually in my final year, so I'm currently buried in my graduation thesis, which keeps me pretty occupied most of the time.
band8.note: Sử dụng từ vựng nâng cao như 'pursuing a degree', 'prestigious', 'buried in my thesis'. Cấu trúc câu phức tốt.

band9.text: As it stands, I'm a final-year undergraduate majoring in International Relations. Beyond just attending lectures, I'm also deeply involved in several campus-based research projects. It's a demanding schedule, but I'm thoroughly enjoying the intellectual stimulation it provides.
band9.note: Phản xạ tự nhiên, từ vựng học thuật đỉnh cao ('undergraduate', 'intellectual stimulation'). Cách diễn đạt 'As it stands' rất bản ngữ.

v.example: As an undergraduate, I have to balance my social life with heavy coursework.
I decided to major in Psychology because I'm fascinated by human behavior.
She is pursuing a degree in Law at a top university.
He was accepted into a prestigious medical school.
Most students feel the pressure of finding a job in their final year.
I spent six months researching for my graduation thesis.
Studying for the IELTS exam occupies most of my free time.
I love my major because it provides constant intellectual stimulation.
Nursing students often have a very demanding schedule.
The academic workload in engineering is known to be quite heavy.
The university organizes a welcome party for all freshers.
She is currently a sophomore majoring in English Literature.
As a junior, I'm starting to look for internship opportunities.
Being a senior means dealing with both exams and job applications.
More students are opting for tertiary education to improve their career prospects.
The school is revising its curriculum to include more practical skills.
I chose Photography as my elective subject this semester.
Mathematics and English are core subjects in the national curriculum.
Distance learning has become increasingly popular due to its flexibility.
He decided to pursue vocational training instead of a traditional degree.
University education aims to develop students' critical thinking skills.
Effective time management is crucial for academic success.
I spent a lot of time on self-study to improve my coding skills.
Many students struggle with peer pressure to excel academically.
She was awarded an full scholarship to study abroad.
The rising cost of tuition fees is a major concern for many families.
The university campus has excellent sports facilities.
Living in a dormitory is a great way to make new friends.
The historical lecture hall can seat up to 500 students.
We had a very engaging seminar on climate change today.
During the tutorial, I was able to ask the professor for clarification.
I have a big assignment due at the end of the week.
Missing a deadline can result in a lower grade.
Maintaining a high GPA is important for graduate school applications.
Participating in extracurricular activities helps develop soft skills.
A summer internship provides valuable hands-on experience.
University is a great place for networking with future colleagues.
Communication and teamwork are essential soft skills for any career.
The course focuses on practical problem-solving in the tech industry.
In a rapidly changing world, lifelong learning is necessary.

v.meaning: sự xuất sắc trong học tập
v.example: The school rewards students for their academic excellence.
Computer literacy is now as important as basic literacy.
Numeracy skills are essential for many everyday tasks.
He has all the necessary qualifications for the job.
Self-study is an effective method for knowledge acquisition.
Traveling and studying abroad help broaden one's horizons.
I'm going to apply for a specialized master's program.
She graduated from university with honors.
He decided to drop out of college to start his own business.
It's hard to keep up with the fast-paced curriculum.
